contexts.context: ...and colleges to the tea-table and the <mark>dressing-room</mark>. His talents were well adapted for an undertaking...
...ever been the favourite of the toilette and the <mark>dressing-room</mark>; while it requires no common strength of mind...
...unopened, and they occupy the parlour and the <mark>dressing-room</mark> while productions of higher name are often gathering dust...
